question: Return the money rank of the poker player with the greatest height.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.Money_Rank FROM people AS T1 JOIN poker_player AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID ORDER BY T1.Height DESC LIMIT 1
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.col_5 FROM poker_player AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.col_2 = T2.col_1 ORDER BY T2.col_3 DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT T1.col_5 FROM poker_player AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.col_2 = T2.col_1 ORDER BY T2.col_3 DESC LIMIT 1;
